luxury_product_video.description: High-end commercial 3x3 grid, cinematic product showcase
luxury_product_video.template: Create a 3x3 grid for a high-end commercial marketing campaign for {product_name}, centered around the product. Visual Style: {style_adjective} and {color_palette}. Grid Concepts: 1. Hero still life. 2. Macro detail of {material}. 3. Dynamic liquid/particles. 4. Minimalist. 5. Floating/Anti-gravity. 6. Sensory close-up. 7. Color-driven scene ({color_palette}). 8. Abstract components. 9. Surreal fusion. Rules: Product branding must be 100% accurate. Cinematic lighting, 8K resolution.
luxury_product_video.negative_prompt: distortion, bad anatomy, text, watermark, low quality

energy_drink_video.description: High-energy commercial with neon effects and fluids
energy_drink_video.template: Hyper-realistic 4K product video of {product_name} ({product_type}), logo sharp. Surface details: condensation, cold tactile look. Action: Vibrant {color_palette} flames/fluids erupting from bottom, licking around the product without consuming it. Background: Dark, cinematic, with {color_palette} rim lighting. Atmosphere: Volumetric smoke, high contrast, slow motion eruption.

cosmetic_dive_video.template: Vertical advertising visual. {product_name} arranged in a queue like divers on a platform. Below, a pool of molten {material} ({color_palette}). Products dive into the pool. Style: Playful anthropomorphic surrealism, luxury cosmetic advertising aesthetics. Lighting: Soft studio beauty lighting.

lifestyle_shopping_image.description: Candid lifestyle photography in a premium supermarket
lifestyle_shopping_image.template: Hyper-realistic candid full-body photo of a {subject_demographic} shopping in a {environment_type}. Context: Holding/Interacting with {product_name}. Lighting: {lighting_style}. Style: Cinematic, natural, photorealistic, 8K, highly detailed environment.

ultra_realistic_product_image.template: Ultra-realistic commercial image of {product_name} ({product_type}). {composition_details}. Clean studio setup, {color_palette} background. 8K resolution, professional lighting, sharp focus, advertising standard.
